---
title: "Susan Whorley"
---

## Susan Whorley

**Dates:** (b.1814/5)

### Description

sister of Judith (Whorley) Fielder.

### Biography

They appear to have been daughters of James Whorley (b. 1764/5), agricultural labourer, of Otterbourne and his wife Jane (b.1778).  [1841, 51 censuses]

### Letters

- Letter from <b>Error! Bookmark not defined</b>.OtterbournMarch 31st [1855]
- Letter from March 15th [1852[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
